next_action: Resume OpenCTI dashboard widget investigation. All 9 TIM phases complete. Implement fix for empty widgets — recommended starting point is CISA KEV connector (docker-compose.yml addition).
context_notes: OpenCTI dashboard diagnosis complete (2026-07-01). Three widgets empty: (1) Most Targeted Victims — only 1 Identity object (MITRE Corp itself), 0 'targets' relationships; (2) Most Active Vulnerabilities — 77,002 CVEs present but 0 'exploits' relationships linking threat actors to CVEs; (3) Targeted Countries — 57 Country objects present but 0 'targets' relationships. Root cause: connector-mitre imports ATT&CK taxonomy only (no victim/geo relationships); connector-cve imports CVE objects only (no exploitation relationships). Fix options: (A) Add CISA KEV connector → creates exploits rels for ~1000 actively exploited CVEs; (B) Import STIX bundle with targets relationships for victims and countries; (C) Manually create Sector objects + relationships in OpenCTI UI. No code was written this session.
